name: Node Exporter Full
reason: Host-level CPU, memory, disk, filesystem, and network visibility from node_exporter.

name: Docker and system monitoring
reason: Container and Docker host visibility from cAdvisor and Prometheus, useful for the multi-service compose stack.

name: PostgreSQL Exporter Quickstart and Dashboard
reason: Database health, cache hit ratio, connections, deadlocks, conflicts, and row activity for the auth/game/social/stats Postgres exporters.
